downloader.liveAccessReason: Public GET currently returns Cloudflare challenge; downloader must not bypass access-control or challenge surfaces.

routingNotes: Route public chapter-content navigation through the SiteAdapter.
Route full-book public downloads through the chapter-content Python downloader with OCR enabled for body images.
OCR is only for public chapter body images, never CAPTCHA, login, risk-control, or permission challenge surfaces.

downloader.reason: Jable video download routing is an experimental placeholder; no native resource resolver has been safety-reviewed yet.

routingNotes: Catalog navigation and ranking queries remain read-only.
Download routing may produce an auditable native miss only; do not parse player pages or media URLs for this site.
Treat 123av as an adult catalog-detail site with public read-only navigation only.
Do not promote individual video titles, descriptions, comments, thumbnails, or recommendation text as capabilities.
Do not expose download, media-resolution, login, upload, write, payment, account mutation, or private-message actions for this site.
Public routes are read-only navigation only.
No public search form, download route, write operation, login flow, payment flow, or API surface was observed in the public structural audit.

genericLiveBuild.reason: www.zhihu.com robots.txt disallows generic SiteForge live crawling for User-Agent: *. Read-only capability promotion requires user-authorized sanitized structure summaries, official/API metadata, or deterministic local validation.
alternativeAccessPaths: Use official/API metadata with documented permission and rate boundaries.
Use user-authorized sanitized structure summaries for authenticated read-only surfaces.
Use deterministic local HTTP validation for tests without claiming live Zhihu support.

routingNotes: Model Zhihu as a social-content site, not a book, catalog, ecommerce, or news site.
Authenticated read-only capability candidates require route-specific sanitized Browser Bridge evidence before activation.
Write, answer, comment, vote, like, collect, follow, delete, message, upload, payment, and account mutation actions remain disabled by default.
Do not persist answer body, article body, comment body, cookies, tokens, Authorization headers, browser profiles, or raw private DOM.

downloader.reason: Social media download routing records a blocked report only; no media fetch or archive execution is exposed.

genericLiveBuild.reason: x.com robots.txt disallows the generic SiteForge live crawler from root-level public collection. Social capabilities require an authorized or deterministic local HTTP validation path before any live support claim.
alternativeAccessPaths: Use an official/API or platform-authorized integration with terms-compatible access and documented rate, permission, and data-use boundaries.
Use a user-authorized bounded X SiteAdapter workflow with explicit consent, minimal redacted SessionView material, and no raw credential, cookie, or browser profile persistence.
Use deterministic local HTTP validation for CI or documentation, clearly labeled as not live X support.

routingNotes: Generic live URL-to-Skill collection is blocked for x.com by robots; do not promote profile, timeline, search, media, archive, account, or API capabilities from generic public crawl evidence.
Future X capability claims require official/API, platform-authorized, user-authorized bounded SiteAdapter, or deterministic local HTTP validation evidence.

notes: Treat generic x.com live build as uncollectable; deterministic local coverage is not live support.

downloader.reason: Governed Instagram action tasks may download discovered image/video binaries into local media artifacts when media download is enabled.

routingNotes: Model Instagram as an authenticated social-content site, not a book or generic catalog site.
Do not promote captions, comments, profile bios, post titles, recommendation text, thumbnails, or direct-message text as capabilities.

Authenticated read-only capability activation requires bounded user-authorized browser evidence; raw credentials, cookies, profile paths, storage, DOM, HTML, account identifiers, and private bodies must not be persisted.
Posting, commenting, replying, following, liking, deleting, messaging, profile edits, upload, payment, account mutation, and private-message read actions remain disabled by default.

restrictionSignals: private direct-message and account settings surfaces
write, upload, follow, like, comment, delete, payment, and account mutation controls
notes: Generic logged-out crawl is not sufficient proof for Instagram capability coverage; use user-authorized bounded SiteAdapter evidence and never persist raw session material.

genericLiveBuild.reason: Reddit generic public crawl covers only allowed public navigation; full capability coverage requires a bounded user-authorized Reddit SiteAdapter path plus official API metadata.
alternativeAccessPaths: Use official Reddit API documentation and OAuth read runtime plans for structured read API coverage.
Use a user-authorized bounded Reddit SiteAdapter workflow with sanitized Browser Bridge summaries for authenticated UI surfaces.
Keep write, vote, moderation mutation, submit, delete, and account mutation operations disabled by default.
